---
title: "A lack of sexual dimorphism in width-to-height ratio in white european faces using 2D photographs, 3D scans, and anthropometry"
authors: "Kramer, R., Jones, A. L., & Ward, R."
year: 2012
date: 2012-01-01
pub-journal: "PLOS ONE"
volume: "7(8)"
pages: "e42705"
doi: "10.1371/journal.pone.0042705"
pdf: "assets/papers/2012/kramer_etal_2012.pdf"
categories: [morphometrics]
---
